content.en:
"Senior, please speak, I will try my best to find healing things for seniors!"

Ye Tian said.

The mysterious woman waved her hand, and the names of many healing objects emerged.

And, she also named some places.

【Kunxu Land】

【River of the Dragon Emperor】

【Shadow River】

"Little one, these three places have some healing things I need, although the level is not high, but it is enough for me to stabilize my injuries and speed up my recovery. Of course, you can't go deep into these three places, otherwise there is a danger of falling. Moreover, these three places are all located in the thirteenth dimension, and I will give you a map of the territory of the thirteenth dimension, so that you can have some understanding of the thirteenth dimension. "

Subsequently.

The mysterious woman gave Ye Tian a map of the territory of the thirteenth dimension.

"This territory map marks a lot of places occupied by some forces, even if you see good things in these places, don't rob them, almost all the forces that occupy these places have the eighth realm, if you offend the eighth realm, you kid won't be able to live. "

The mysterious woman reminded.

"Understood!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian left.

He knew very well that if he wanted to get the benefits of chance from the mysterious woman, 090 had to find something to heal, otherwise the mysterious woman would not give him benefits.

After analysis, he finally decided to go to Kunxu Land first.

......

The thirteenth dimension.

The Land of Kunxu.

Ye Tian came here.

The land of Kunxu is extremely dangerous, and the general seventh realm is certain to die when they come here, and only the top seventh realm has any hope of survival, but they can only find some resources in the periphery, if they dare to go to the mainland, the top seventh realm is bound to die.

According to the introduction of the mysterious woman, the land of Kunxu is not only wandering with many multi-dimensional beings of the seventh realm, but also a terrifying ghost mist, this ghost mist is also a special life, there is no specific realm, and it cannot be killed, but once it is covered, it will definitely die.

Fortunately, this kind of ghost mist is only in the depths of the Kunxu Land, and it will hardly come out, unless there is a seventh realm existence that lures it out.

For the ghost fog, the mysterious woman didn't say much, only said that it was a product of dimensional rules, that is, a dimensional rule life, as long as it was not covered or touched, there would be no danger.

Wow!

Ye Tian entered the land of Kunxu, and immediately began to look for the healing things that the mysterious woman wanted.

Of course, if he encounters something good, he will also take it.

Soon, Ye Tian encountered the multi-dimensional life of the seventh realm, and a battle broke out.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian directly cast the Six Realms Supreme Peerless Sword Twelve and fought with it, but he only injured the other party, allowing this Seventh Realm multi-dimensional life to escape.

In the seventh realm, unless the difference in strength is huge, it is difficult to kill the other party.

Moreover, he had only broken through to the seventh realm, even if he could be the strongest of the six realms, but it was only the strongest of the six realms, and his power was not as good as the supreme mastery of the seven realms.

In addition, he has not yet comprehended the thirteen-dimensional will mastery, so his combat effectiveness will naturally not be exaggerated.

Time flies.

Some time has passed.

He explored many places in the Kunxu Land, but he didn't find the healing thing that the mysterious woman needed, after all, it was a healing thing that had an effect on the eighth realm, so it was naturally impossible to find it easily.

Ye Tian is not in a hurry, and the mysterious woman is not in a hurry, the other party has been injured for endless years, and he doesn't care about this time.

this day.

Ye Tian encountered a very powerful Seventh Realm multidimensional life, and he tried his best to escape at the cost of serious injuries.

"The Kunxu Land is really dangerous, but I am also too aggressive, and if I am not careful, I will encounter that extremely powerful Seventh Realm multidimensional life!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, even if he chooses again, he will still be so aggressive, after all, he has the confidence to take the initiative.

Now, he had cultivated the Thirty-Six Star Secret Technique (AHEF) to the twenty-eighth level, which could shield the deduction and tracking of the weaker Eighth Realm.

Another period of time has passed.

During this period, Ye Tian's copy body was severely injured many times, and even once he directly encountered an extremely terrifying Seventh Realm multidimensional life, and was killed by the opponent in one move.

However, in the end, Ye Tian still found a healing thing that met the requirements of the mysterious woman.

"That's the Yunwei Golden Fruit, it can heal wounds, and it is useful for that mysterious woman. "

Ye Tian smiled, after all, there are still a lot of Yunwei Golden Fruits here, there are dozens of them in total, once they are brought back, they must alleviate the mysterious woman's injuries.

Thereupon.

He condensed a copy body and prepared multiple copy bodies to shoot together to snatch the Yunwei Golden Fruit.

"There are a total of six seventh-realm multi-dimensional lives, the strength is not clear, but there should be hope to take away these Yunwei Golden Fruits!"

Bang!!!!!

Ye Tian fought with these Seventh Realm multi-dimensional beings, fighting with them, even fighting desperately, burning the Dimensional Domain Origin in his body.

And these seventh-realm multi-dimensional beings are indeed powerful, and they also have a joint killing move, blocking the dimensional void, and it is a little difficult to get close to these Yunwei Golden Fruits.

If you can't break their blockade, you won't be able to take those Yunwei Golden Fruits.

"Sword Twelve!"

Each of Ye Tian's copied bodies performed this Six Realms Supreme Technique, focusing on one point.

Click!!!

The dimensional void in this area was shattered, and the blockade was forcibly broken.

Immediately, Ye Tian sacrificed three replica bodies to stop them, and the other replica bodies seized the Yunwei Golden Fruit, and these seventh-realm multi-dimensional beings did not desperately protect the Yunwei Golden Fruit.

Wow!!!!!

When Yunwei Jinguo arrived, Ye Tian quickly fled, leaving three replica bodies behind.

In the end, these three replica bodies were killed, but they also desperately killed one of the Seventh Realm multidimensional beings.

......

"Hahaha, dozens of Yunwei Golden Fruits are in hand, it's very good. "

Ye Tian was very satisfied, although he sacrificed three replica bodies, there was no damage to him.

Of course, he could also plan slowly, or accumulate strength, but he didn't know how much time it would take, and now it's even faster.

After obtaining these Yunwei Golden Fruits, he didn't take them all out and give them to the mysterious woman, he naturally left ten as a backup, in case they are useful in the future, or if they are traded, they can be exchanged for countless resources, and there is no need to take them all out and hand them over to the mysterious woman.
